Class RebindableSerializerFactory

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.persistence.kryo.RebindableSerializerFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.esotericsoftware.kryo.SerializerFactory
public class RebindableSerializerFactory extends Object implements com.esotericsoftware.kryo.SerializerFactory
A custom SerializerFactory that automatically wraps all created serializers with a RebindableWrapperSerializer.

This ensures that the rebind() hook is consistently applied across the entire object graph during deserialization.

Resilience: This factory also detects "hidden classes" (e.g., Java 17+ lambdas or internal library proxies) and provides a safe null-serializer to prevent Kryo from crashing during the serialization of complex object graphs.

Author:
anahata

    • createNullSerializer

      private com.esotericsoftware.kryo.Serializer createNullSerializer()
      Creates a minimal serializer that writes nothing and returns null on read. Used as a safety fallback for problematic classes.
      Returns:
      A safe, null-op Kryo Serializer.
